summary: Carbon Marketplace Features Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED (100%). Verified: 1) Carbon credit submission API, 2) Admin approval/rejection workflow, 3) Stats API, 4) Approved credits appearing on marketplace, 5) Quick access buttons on Cooperative/Farmer/Admin dashboards, 6) QR code route removal.
critical_code_review_comments: carbon_listings.py: Full CRUD + approval workflow implemented correctly with proper RBAC (lines 121-125 for admin check)
CarbonMarketplace.jsx: Uses DEMO_CREDITS fallback when API returns empty - good UX (lines 138-139)
Dashboard.jsx (Cooperative): Has Bourse des Récoltes and Marché Carbone quick access buttons (lines 266-286)
Dashboard.jsx (Farmer): Has Bourse des Récoltes and Marché Carbone quick access buttons (lines 171-184)
SuperAdminDashboard.jsx: Has Approbation Carbone and Marché Carbone quick access buttons (lines 252-265)
App.js: QR code route /cooperative/qrcodes correctly removed, new routes /carbon-marketplace/create and /admin/carbon-approvals added
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple carbon listings with TEST_ prefix for approval workflow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carbon marketplace features fully implemented and tested. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_carbon_listings_api.py covers all endpoints. Demo data (DEMO_CREDITS) in CarbonMarketplace.jsx provides fallback when no real credits exist. Quick access buttons verified on all 3 dashboards (Cooperative, Farmer, Admin).

features_verified.POST /api/carbon-listings/submit: PASS - Cooperative can submit carbon credits for approval
features_verified.GET /api/carbon-listings/pending: PASS - Admin can see pending submissions (403 for non-admin)
features_verified.GET /api/carbon-listings/all: PASS - Admin can see all listings with status filter
features_verified.GET /api/greenlink/carbon-credits: PASS - Returns approved credits for marketplace
features_verified./carbon-marketplace page: PASS - Shows credits with 'Soumettre mes Crédits Carbone' button
features_verified./carbon-marketplace/create page: PASS - Create form loads with all fields
features_verified./admin/carbon-approvals page: PASS - Admin approval interface with approve/reject buttons
features_verified.Admin Dashboard - Approbation Carbone: PASS - Quick access button navigates to /admin/carbon-approvals
features_verified.Admin Dashboard - Marché Carbone: PASS - Quick access button navigates to /carbon-marketplace
features_verified.QR Code route removed: PASS - /cooperative/qrcodes route not in App.js, endpoint returns 404/405

workflow_verification.full_approval_flow: VERIFIED - Submit -> Pending list -> Admin approve -> Credit appears on marketplace
workflow_verification.rejection_flow: VERIFIED - Submit -> Pending list -> Admin reject -> Status updated to rejected
